subcodes.first_line: We call to mind the days when thou wert present with thine uncle - upon him rest God's mercy and grace - before Our face [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نذکر الایام التی کنت حاضرا مع عمک علیه رحمه الله و فضله امام الوجه و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @presence of; reunion with God, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @consolation and comfort
